title: CIE Process Flow for Design of Experiments & ANOVA
description: A flowchart depicting the continuous internal evaluation process for a student in a Design of Experiments & ANOVA module, from experiment design to final analysis.
relationships: Sequential flow from 'Define Research Question' to 'Receive Instructor Feedback', with a feedback loop from 'Receive Instructor Feedback' back to 'Design Experiment' to represent iterative improvement based on evaluation.
